query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'recebimento_tiss' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('convenio_id', 'data_referencia', 'data_pagamento');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'recebimento_tiss' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('convenio_id', 'data_referencia', 'data_pagamento');
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE
convenio_id	int	YES
